heading: Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation
label: 110 Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)110(a)(no source).110(b)33:981 (note)., , .Oct. 15, 1966Pub. L. 89–670, § 8(g)(2)80 Stat. 943Subsection (a) is included to provide in chapter 1 of the revised title a complete list of the organizational units established by law that are in the Department of Transportation or are subject to the direction and supervision of the Secretary of Transportation.

Amendments2020—, substituted “Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation” for “Saint Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation” in section catchline.Pub. children.label: a
children.text: The Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation established under (), is subject to the direction and supervision of the Secretary of Transportation.section 1 of the Act of May 13, 195433 U.S.C. 981

children.label: b
children.text: The Administrator of the Corporation appointed under (), reports directly to the Secretary.section 2 of the Act of May 13, 195433 U.S.C. 982
